case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT OT DISPOSITION:$16,776.OO U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE (OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE, AND NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS, AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM MC 200, CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO CLAIMANT TERRY WHEELER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY PAUL DENNISON ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT TERRY WHEELER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6311.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THECRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT OT DISPOSITION:$16,776.OO U.S. CURRENCY: #45,600.00,U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT VONNER, PARNELL
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY CLAIMANT VONNER, PARNELL
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO CLAIMANT TERRY WHEELER FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $7,000.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY MARK GOLDROSEN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT PARNELL VONNER. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $55,376.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
